description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tox that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have two jobs: test and check. The test job should run on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python versions 3.8 to 3.12, installing dependencies, running tox, and uploading a coverage report to Codecov. The check job should run on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.12, installing dependencies and running tox with linters.
